es.name: Calculadora de Punto de Equilibrio
es.desc: Calcula las unidades y ventas necesarias para cubrir todos los costes.
es.description: Calcula las unidades y ventas necesarias para cubrir todos los costes.
es.seo_description: Calcula el punto de equilibrio de tu negocio. Introduce costes fijos, precio de venta y coste variable. Herramienta gratuita con formula y ejemplos.
es.example_label: Finding break-even point for business with €8,500 fixed costs, €75 selling price, and €42 variable cost per unit.
es.result_context: You need to sell pe_unidades of {pe_unidades} units to break even. This generates pe_ventas_eur of {pe_ventas_eur} in revenue.
es.formula_display: Break-even Units = Fixed Costs ÷ (Price - Variable Cost)

steps.description: Divide fixed costs by contribution margin

mistakes: Not including all fixed costs (rent, salaries, insurance, utilities)
Forgetting that break-even is a minimum target, not a goal

en.name: Return on Investment (ROI) Calculator
en.desc: Calculate the units and sales needed to cover all costs.
en.description: Calculate ROI percentage from investment gain and cost. Measure profitability of investments.
en.seo_title: ROI Calculator — Return on Investment | CalcToWork
en.seo_description: Calculate ROI percentage. Enter investment cost and gain. Free calculator for business and investing.
en.example_label: Finding break-even point for business with €8,500 fixed costs, €75 selling price, and €42 variable cost per unit.

range_hints.precio_venta: â‚¬5 - â‚¬5,000+ per unit selling price
range_hints.coste_variable: â‚¬1 - â‚¬2,000 per unit variable cost

en.result_context: You need to sell pe_unidades of {pe_unidades} units to break even. This generates pe_ventas_eur of {pe_ventas_eur} in revenue.
en.formula_display: Break-even Units = Fixed Costs ÷ (Price - Variable Cost)
steps: {'step': 1, 'description': 'Calculate contribution margin per unit', 'calculation': '€75 - €42 = €33 per unit'}
{'step': 2, 'description': 'Divide fixed costs by contribution margin', 'calculation': '€8,500 ÷ €33 = 257.58 units'}
{'step': 3, 'description': 'Round up to whole units', 'calculation': '258 units needed'}
{'step': 4, 'description': 'Calculate break-even revenue', 'calculation': '258 × €75 = €19,350'}
mistakes: Not including all fixed costs (rent, salaries, insurance, utilities)
Forgetting that break-even is a minimum target, not a goal
